{{< block "grid-1" >}}
{{< column "mt-2 pt-1">}}


# MonProcessEX.sys ![:inline](/images/twitter_verified.png) 

### Description

MonProcessEX.sys is a HONOR MagicAnimation and HONOR PCManager kernel driver that exposes IOCTL 0x22400C to reach ZwTerminateProcess. The device is accessible to LocalSystem and local administrators, and the process-termination path does not verify the caller, allowing an administrator-accessible client to terminate arbitrary user-mode processes except PID 0 and PID 4 from kernel mode.
- **UUID**: c3c083d2-e9bd-4891-8582-46086de2b2b4
- **Created**: 2026-07-08
- **Author**: Michael Haag
- **Acknowledgement**:  | [@wwwab123](https://twitter.com/@wwwab123)

{{< button "https://github.com/magicsword-io/LOLDrivers/raw/main/drivers/b32a250d1ef99bb62dd66cea60311f43.bin" "Download" >}}
{{< tip "warning" >}}
This download link contains the vulnerable driver!

{{< /tip >}}

{{< blockbanner "MonProcessEX.sys" >}}
### Commands

```
sc.exe create MonProcessEX binPath=C:\windows\temp\MonProcessEX.sys type=kernel &amp;&amp; sc.exe start MonProcessEX
```


| Use Case | Privileges | Operating System | 
|:---- | ---- | ---- |
| Terminate arbitrary processes through an insufficiently protected kernel IOCTL handler. | kernel | Windows 10 |
